name: aiia-tokens
source: Extracted from ericlovo/aiia-console (Tailwind 4.3, src/App.css @theme block) on 2026-06-09. aiia-console is the canonical implementation; this document mirrors what is actually used in the desktop app.
note: The console was re-skinned onto the BRAND surface (vellum / ink / cinnabar — Penguin Classics-inspired, Claude.ai-quiet). The legacy 'console' utility names (void, carbon-*, text-*, amethyst-*) are kept so components don't churn, but their values are rebound onto the vellum/ink scale — the names are now historical and no longer describe colour. The effective values below come from the @theme block, which overrides the older dark scale still present in src/styles/aiia-tokens.css.

font.display: "Cormorant Garamond", "ITC Galliard", "Adobe Caslon Pro", Garamond, serif
font.mono: "JetBrains Mono", "SF Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace

accent.note: The 'amethyst' utility names are retained but rebound onto the warm-black ink scale. Cinnabar is reserved for explicit single-spot accent use.

graphCategory.note: Per-category hues for the memory force-graph (src/brain/client.ts CATEGORY_COLORS). Passed to react-force-graph as raw CSS strings; not all map to a theme token.
